title: Tsibyah #6645
definition:
Zibiah = "roe"

 1) a native of Beersheba, wife of king Ahaziah and mother of king
    Joash both of Judah
nasbUsage:

 1) a native of Beersheba, wife of king Ahaziah and mother of king
    Joash both of Judah

    NASB:  gazelle, mother of Jehoash
